{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43567", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

screen_record outPath bypassed workspace-only filesystem guard.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

The node-host screen recording tool could honor an `outPath` outside the workspace guard, allowing an authorized tool call to write outside the intended workspace boundary.

## Technical Details

The fix applies the workspace-root guard to node tool `outPath` handling, including screen recording paths.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #63551. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `635bb35b68d8faa5bfa2fda35feadd315122748a`
- PR: #63551

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @anshumanbh for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0022, "percentile": 0.1231}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:58:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43567"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:58:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63551", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/635bb35b68d8faa5bfa2fda35feadd315122748a", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: screen_record outPath bypassed workspace-only filesystem guard", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T11:59:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jf25-7968-h2h5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
